summary: Referral partner candidate with strong contractor audience access, realistic volume expectations, and low compliance risk. Good Tier 2 candidate after activation call confirms referral workflow and audience quality.
risk_flags: Manual review required before active partner status
Tracking link and lead handoff process not configured yet
next_action: Send onboarding packet and schedule activation call before assigning active campaign assets.
reviewer_notes: Do not grant fast-track status until the partner confirms how referrals are sourced and whether they understand compliance-safe positioning. Good candidate, but do not let enthusiasm outrun process. That is how the circus gets a CRM login.
